Episodes.Title: System Breakdown
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Tony De Santis, Marco Grazzini
Episodes.Plot: Plane crashes caused by communication breakdowns expose the changes that need to be made to our overburdened air traffic control system.

Episodes.Title: Cruel Skies
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Ashleigh Rains, Brittany Allen
Episodes.Plot: Aviation disasters caused by storms are detailed along with the efforts of the FAA to ensure the safety of passengers and crew during inclement weather.
